name: Flying "C"
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>飛</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ひ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>翔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しょう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>する<ruby lang="jp"><rb>Ｇ</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ジー</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. The controller of this card cannot Xyz Summon.
mnst_eff: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. The controller of this card cannot Xyz Summon.
eff: When your opponent Normal or Special Summons a monster(s) (except during the Damage Step): You can Special Summon this card from your hand to the opponent's field in Defense Position. The controller of this card cannot Xyz Summon.

sets.set: Judgment of the Light: Deluxe Edition

summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand to your opponent's field
